title: Megabonk
edition_pinned: Megabonk Steam 1.0 (vedinad / John Megabonk; released 2025-09-18 for Windows & Linux) — 3D survivor-like as shipped at launch
moat: 3D vertical maps plus jump/slide speed turns survivor auto-combat into mobility routing, not only 2D kiting.

loop_skeleton.description: Navigate a procedurally generated 3D map with vertical routes, auto-attack hordes and bosses, collect XP gems for random upgrade offers, complete in-run quests and elites, die or survive, then spend scarce Silver for permanent unlocks.

depth_mechanisms.name: 3d vertical kite space
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Procedural third-person maps include height, ramps, and fall risk; enemies can knock the player through space. Positioning uses jump, slide, and speed boosts, not only planar orbiting.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If maps are flattened to 2D with no jump/slide/height, death-from-knockback and route-secret rates fall and the game becomes statistically closer to a flat survivor-like clone.

depth_mechanisms.name: random upgrade synergy offers
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Level-ups present random rarity-weighted upgrade offers across weapons and items so runs assemble different synergies; 70+ items and many weapons support combo explosion late run.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If upgrade offers are fixed sequential unlocks with no random forks, run-to-run build variance collapses and second-session 'try another combo' motive weakens.

depth_mechanisms.name: scarce silver meta
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Silver is uncommon meta currency earned from challenges, silvery-blue pots, and Silver Tome upgrades; it permanently unlocks characters, weapons, and tomes rather than flooding every run with permanent power.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If Silver drops at the same rate as common gold every run, permanent unlock speed spikes and the challenge-gated unlock ladder stops structuring second-session goals.

depth_mechanisms.name: quest-gated roster unlocks
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: 200+ in-game quests gate the 20-character roster and weapons during rounds, so meta progress is task-shaped rather than pure time-played.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If all characters unlock by cumulative XP only, quest completion rates drop and players stop hunting in-run challenge objectives.

feel_signature: A slide or jump commits a 3D path while auto-weapons fire; a level-up pause forces a rarity-weighted pick that changes how the next horde is cleared.
second_session_answer: Players return to complete quests for Silver and unlock the next character or tome, then test a new mobility+weapon synergy on procedural maps.
packaging_lessons: Ship auto-combat first, then add 3D movement (jump/slide/speed) as the differentiator from 2D survivor-likes.
Keep meta currency scarce and quest-gated so unlocks remain session goals after the first clear.
anti_lessons: Do not treat Megabonk as a skin of Vampire Survivors — copying auto-attack without 3D vertical mobility and knockback space misses the moat.
Do not flood Silver; scarcity is load-bearing for quest-driven return.

system_bom.note: 3D move + auto-attack + XP pick is the run core
items, chests, and upgrade offers are the run loot
gems from kills drive level-up offers
random rarity upgrades are the decision points
Silver unlocks characters, weapons, tomes across runs
death ends the run; survival length and bosses structure success

citations.claim: moat/edition: 3D Vampire Survivors-like; procedural maps; auto combat; random upgrades; released 2025-09-18 Windows/Linux by vedinad.
depth_mechanisms.3d vertical kite space: third-person maps with verticality; slide, jump, speed boosts; movement is multi-directional.
depth_mechanisms.random upgrade synergy offers and Steam loop: fight hordes, loot, level up, random upgrade rarity, unlock characters.
depth_mechanisms.scarce silver meta: Silver via challenges, pots, Silver Tome; permanent unlocks.
depth_mechanisms.quest-gated roster: 20 characters, 70+ items, 200+ quests documented.
feel_signature Risk of Rain 2 × Vampire Survivors comparison for 3D survivor loop.
system_bom character count and unlock surface.
